content: Add AI to your workspace — ${{price}} to get started.

comment.text: Hero title on the AI paywall page that prompts users to add AI features; includes a `${{price}}` variable representing the starting cost.

usage.context: lineHeight="24px" className={styles.heroTitle} > {waitingPhase === "completed" ? t("AIPaywallHeroTitleCompleted") : t("AIPaywallHeroTitle", { price: START_AMOUNT })}
